name: swe-codex
description: Codex-native workflows for creating plugins, skills, agents, and coordinated engineering solutions.

interface.longDescription: Creates and evolves Codex plugins, reusable skills, native custom agents, and coordinated Codex engineering workflows. REQUIRES a local installation of LocalRag.
defaultPrompt: Use $new-plugin to design and scaffold a new Codex plugin.
Use $new-skill to create or improve a reusable Codex skill.
Use $new-agent to create or improve a project-scoped Codex agent.
Use $orchestrate to coordinate a multi-step Codex solution.
